purpose: Prevent premature full OS exports. Enforce overlay → guard → lock ladder.

export_ladder.name: overlay_export
export_ladder.allowed_when: After local validation of overlay files

export_ladder.name: full_os_export
export_ladder.allowed_when: After full-bundle export guard returns ALLOW

export_ladder.name: baseline_lock
export_ladder.allowed_when: After runner dry-run passes AND re-extract verifies AND export guard passes

hard_rules: NEVER hand Robert a tiny-slice ZIP and call it the full OS — the export guard denies this
NEVER lock a baseline without runner dry-run proof
NEVER skip re-extract verification before a lock
Overlay exports are always safe — they do not claim to be the full OS
If export guard returns DENY, stop and write a blocker receipt immediately
